$schema-comment: Production defaults. Do not check in user-overridable values here. For local-dev overrides use appsettings.Development.json which is git-ignored.

Heartbeat._comment: IntervalSeconds: how often we POST to /api/acars/heartbeat. 2s is the sweet spot — fast enough for live-map smoothness, slow enough to not hammer the server.
Heartbeat._comment2: MaxQueueDepth: how many heartbeats to keep buffered when the server is unreachable. At 2s interval, 100 entries = ~3min of offline tolerance. Beyond that, oldest is dropped.
